---
title: "February 2026"
---

- Plasma Diagnostic course (passed)
- Starting Atomic and Radiative processes in Plasmas course.
- TA for the thermodynamics course.
- Starting implementation of fitting algorithm for MSE syntethic data (not working yet).
- Joined the DDJ Ninja team.
- Presented expercise 1.3 in the course of Atomic and Radiative processes in Plasmas.
- Experiment to anlyse polarizer dependency with respect to LOS. It seems no such dependence is observed.
- Build the DDJ shifts app.
